description_long: This guard rail consists of five parallel horizontal bars, evenly spaced and supported by two vertical posts at each end. The structure is constructed from what appears to be black-coated metal tubing, giving it a sleek and industrial appearance. The ends of the horizontal rails are capped and slightly protrude past the vertical posts, which are subtly curved at the base for mounting. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible decorative elements or reflective markings. The rail is likely intended for use along roadsides, parking lots, or pedestrian walkways to prevent vehicles or people from crossing into restricted areas. The finish is smooth and glossy, suggesting a protective coating for weather resistance.
description: A black metal guard rail with five horizontal bars and two vertical posts, featuring a smooth, glossy finish and a minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five horizontal bars and both vertical posts, highlighting the full width and structure.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the rail, with only the thickness of the posts and rails visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the five horizontal bars and vertical posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the alignment of the bars and posts.
